hero.name: Bruno Thomsen Sobrinho
hero.title: Front-End Developer
hero.description: Front-End Developer passionate about creating amazing digital experiences. Specialized in React, TypeScript and modern web technologies.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: Front-End Developer passionate about technology and innovation
about.text1: I'm a dedicated developer and technology enthusiast, studying Systems Analysis and Development at Universidade Positivo. My journey in the programming world started with curiosity and turned into a true passion.
about.text2: I specialize in creating modern, responsive and accessible interfaces, always seeking best development practices and the latest market technologies.
about.text3: I believe in the power of technology to transform lives and businesses, and I'm always looking for new challenges that allow me to grow professionally and make a difference.

highlights.desc1: Specialized in React, TypeScript and Next.js
highlights.desc2: Interfaces that work perfectly on all devices
highlights.desc4: Experience with agile methodologies and teamwork

education.title: Education
education.description: Technology course focused on software development, covering programming, databases, software engineering, agile methodologies and project management.

web.title: Web Development
web.desc: Practical projects with React, TypeScript and Node.js

experience.intro: My professional journey and developed projects

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's talk?
contact.description: I'm always open to new opportunities, interesting projects and conversations about technology. Get in touch!
